name: mega-orchestration
description: Config-driven multi-agent delegation guidance for Codex, a vendor-neutral browser delegate, and Antigravity-aware workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Route scoped work to the right agent runtime.
interface.longDescription: A provider-agnostic delegation skill and config for deciding when to use Codex, a vendor-neutral browser/visual delegate (playwright-cli plus a vision-capable model), Antigravity, or same-model subagents for review, implementation, visual, and browser work.
defaultPrompt: Use mega-orchestration to review this plan.
Use mega-orchestration to delegate this safely.
